TEST layer4_vw_accumulation
NDET 3
NFAULT 3
CTF 2 0 2
CTF 2 0 1
CTF 2 1 2
FTC 2 0 1
FTC 2 1 2
FTC 2 0 2
WEIGHTS 4.5951198501345898 4.5951198501345898 0.40546510810816422
